mapper.sql: id, conversation_id, sender_id, parent_id, content, type, read_at, sender_deleted_at, receiver_deleted_at, recalled_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM blog_message WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT FROM blog_message WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND sender_deleted_at IS NULL AND receiver_deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_message WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND sender_deleted_at IS NULL AND receiver_deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_message WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND sender_id != #{receiverId} AND read_at IS NULL AND sender_deleted_at IS NULL AND receiver_deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_message m INNER JOIN blog_conversation c ON m.conversation_id = c.id WHERE c.deleted_at IS NULL AND m.deleted_at IS NULL AND m.read_at IS NULL AND m.sender_id != #{userId} AND m.sender_deleted_at IS NULL AND m.receiver_deleted_at IS NULL AND ( (c.participant_a_id = #{userId} AND c.a_deleted_at IS NULL) OR (c.participant_b_id = #{userId} AND c.b_deleted_at IS NULL) )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_message (id, conversation_id, sender_id, parent_id, content, type, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{conversationId}, #{senderId}, #{parentId}, #{content}, #{type}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_message SET recalled_at = #{recalledAt}, updated_at = #{recalledAt}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND sender_id = #{senderId} AND recalled_at IS NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE blog_message SET read_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND sender_id != #{receiverId} AND read_at IS NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL AND sender_deleted_at IS NULL AND receiver_deleted_at IS NULL
